title: [FIRRTL][circt-reduce] Connect Forwarder Crashes w/ Layers
body:
Consider the following:

``` mlir
firrtl.circuit "Foo" {
  firrtl.layer @A bind {
  }
  firrtl.module private @Bar() {
    %c0_ui1 = firrtl.constant 0 : !firrtl.uint<1>
    %wire = firrtl.wire : !firrtl.probe<uint<1>, @A>
    firrtl.layerblock @A {
      %wire_0 = firrtl.wire {name = "wire"} : !firrtl.uint<1>
      firrtl.matchingconnect %wire_0, %c0_ui1 : !firrtl.uint<1>
      %0 = firrtl.ref.send %wire_0 : !firrtl.uint<1>
      %1 = firrtl.ref.cast %0 : (!firrtl.probe<uint<1>>) -> !firrtl.probe<uint<1>, @A>
      firrtl.ref.define %wire, %1 : !firrtl.probe<uint<1>, @A>
    }
  }
  firrtl.extmodule @Foo()
}
```

Running the connect forwarder on this will crash:

``` console
# circt-reduce -skip-initial -test='exit 0' connect-forwarder.0.mlir -include connect-forwarder -o /dev/null 
Reading input
Testing input with `exit 0`
Initial module has size 625
Trying reduction `connect-forwarder`
Assertion failed: (other && other->block == block && "Expected other operation to have the same parent block."), function isBeforeInBlock, file Operation.cpp, line 386.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.	Program arguments: circt-reduce -skip-initial "-test=exit 0" connect-forwarder.0.mlir -include connect-forwarder -o /dev/null
Stack dump without symbol names (ensure you have llvm-symbolizer in your PATH or set the environment var `LLVM_SYMBOLIZER_PATH` to point to it):
0  circt-reduce             0x0000000102f9bc34 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) + 56
1  circt-reduce             0x0000000102f99b1c llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() + 172
2  circt-reduce             0x0000000102f9c6dc SignalHandler(int, __siginfo*, void*) + 300
3  libsystem_platform.dylib 0x000000018fd516a4 _sigtramp + 56
4  libsystem_pthread.dylib  0x000000018fd17848 pthread_kill + 296
5  libsystem_c.dylib        0x000000018fc209e4 abort + 124
6  libsystem_c.dylib        0x000000018fc1fc18 err + 0
7  circt-reduce             0x00000001041794dc mlir::Operation::isBeforeInBlock(mlir::Operation*) (.cold.2) + 0
8  circt-reduce             0x0000000103f65048 mlir::Operation::isBeforeInBlock(mlir::Operation*) + 112
9  circt-reduce             0x0000000103ed464c (anonymous namespace)::ConnectForwarder::match(mlir::Operation*) + 252
10 circt-reduce             0x0000000103ebdd44 circt::Reduction::matches(mlir::Operation*, llvm::function_ref<void (unsigned long long, unsigned long long)>) + 36
11 circt-reduce             0x0000000102f2c580 void llvm::function_ref<void (mlir::Operation*)>::callback_fn<execute(mlir::MLIRContext&)::$_2>(long, mlir::Operation*) + 64
12 circt-reduce             0x0000000102f2c4dc void mlir::detail::walk<mlir::ForwardIterator>(mlir::Operation*, llvm::function_ref<void (mlir::Operation*)>, mlir::WalkOrder) + 180
13 circt-reduce             0x0000000102f2c4dc void mlir::detail::walk<mlir::ForwardIterator>(mlir::Operation*, llvm::function_ref<void (mlir::Operation*)>, mlir::WalkOrder) + 180
14 circt-reduce             0x0000000102f2c4dc void mlir::detail::walk<mlir::ForwardIterator>(mlir::Operation*, llvm::function_ref<void (mlir::Operation*)>, mlir::WalkOrder) + 180
15 circt-reduce             0x0000000102f2c4dc void mlir::detail::walk<mlir::ForwardIterator>(mlir::Operation*, llvm::function_ref<void (mlir::Operation*)>, mlir::WalkOrder) + 180
16 circt-reduce             0x0000000102f26d48 execute(mlir::MLIRContext&) + 3072
17 circt-reduce             0x0000000102f25ebc main + 300
18 dyld                     0x000000018f976b98 start + 6076
zsh: abort      circt-reduce -skip-initial -test='exit 0' connect-forwarder.0.mlir -include  
```
code_blocks: Running the connect forwarder on this will crash:
